description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly upturned tail. The head is rounded and smoothly transitions into a long, flat bill, which is characteristic of many duck species. The plumage is primarily a mix of muted browns and grays, with subtle gradations and some lighter patches along the underside and tail. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the feet are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, mimicking the look of real feathers. The overall form and coloration suggest a wild duck, possibly a species adapted to both water and land environments.
description: A lifelike duck with muted brown and gray plumage, a rounded head, and a long, flat bill. The body is streamlined with folded wings and a matte, feather-like texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the duck, highlighting the elongated body, rounded head, and flat bill.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded head and bill, with the body tapering back and wings folded close.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the duck's body and head.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail and back, with the head and bill barely visible.
